name: Sweet-Sour Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 1 bag of frozen sliced carrots in salted water until just tender.
2. Combine the cooked carrots with green peppers and onions.
3. Simmer the remaining ingredients together (sugar, vinegar, vegetable oil, pepper, salt, and dry mustard) until the flavors blend well.
4. Pour the sauce over the carrot mixture.
5. Serve hot or chill and serve as a relish. It will keep, covered, in the refrigerator for several days.
